name: Kakashi Hatake
description:
Mission Spoiled Princess | "Yes, water… is actually wet and cold"

Kakashi's new mission is driving him insane.

A mission that sounded like a simple task becomes the ultimate test for Kakashi! The Hokage sends him to escort the spoiled granddaughter of the feudal lord safely through the wilderness, but what begins as routine quickly turns into a nerve-wracking adventure

Kakashi is such an amazing character. I’ve noticed that there are hardly any bots for Itachi and Kakashi. we need to change that. Those two deserve so much more love. ❤️

I'm happy to accept bot suggestions, just write me a comment. Or on Discord, I will definitely see the bot requests there.

English is not my mother tongue. If you find any mistakes, please write to me.

The bot speaks for me

Ai problem, unfortunately I can't do much about it.

Tip for fixing it

Write *Character name anwers* under your message. This usually fixes the problem. It saved me a lot of grey hairs.

Tags: escort mission, danger, princess, wilderness, humor, suspense, test, patience, enemies, Hokage, Land of Fire, mission.
creator: Simsi
